name: Prism: Get Shot by Name
description: Find a specific shot by sequence and shot name.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode
from src.utils.prism_core import resolve_prism_core

class PrismGetShotByNameNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Prism: Get Shot by Name"
    category = "DCCs"

    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__(use_exec=False)
        self.icon_path = "icons/prism_icon.png"
        self.add_input("core", "any")
        self.add_input("shots", "list")
        self.add_input("sequence", "string", widget_type="text", default="")
        self.add_input("shot", "string", widget_type="text", default="")
        self.add_output("shot", "dict")
        self.add_output("entity", "dict")
        self.add_output("found", "bool")

    async def execute(self, inputs):
        core = resolve_prism_core(inputs)
        sequence = (inputs.get("sequence") or "").strip()
        shot_name = (inputs.get("shot") or "").strip()
        shots = list(inputs.get("shots") or [])
        if core is None:
            self.log_error("No PrismCore found.")
            return {"shot": {}, "entity": {}, "found": False}
        if not shots:
            try:
                _, shots = core.entities.getShots()
                shots = list(shots or [])
            except Exception as e:
                self.log_error(f"getShots failed: {e}")
                return {"shot": {}, "entity": {}, "found": False}
        seq_lower = sequence.lower()
        shot_lower = shot_name.lower()
        for s in shots:
            s_seq = str(s.get("sequence", "")).lower()
            s_shot = str(s.get("shot", s.get("name", ""))).lower()
            seq_ok = (not sequence) or (s_seq == seq_lower)
            shot_ok = (not shot_name) or (s_shot == shot_lower)
            if seq_ok and shot_ok:
                seq_val = s.get("sequence", "")
                shot_val = s.get("shot", s.get("name", ""))
                entity = {"type": "shot", "sequence": seq_val, "shot": shot_val, "path": s.get("path", ""), "location": s.get("location", "global"), "paths": s.get("paths", [])}
                self.log_info(f"Found shot {seq_val}/{shot_val}")
                return {"shot": s, "entity": entity, "found": True}
        self.log_error(f"Shot '{sequence}/{shot_name}' not found.")
        return {"shot": {}, "entity": {}, "found": False}

def register_node():
    return PrismGetShotByNameNode
